text: EASE RDS - Multi AZ - Cluster I CE * 1 Writer and 2 Reader DB instances (different AZs) e .... Much faster hardware, Graviton + local NVME SSD Storage s .... Fast writes to local storage => flushed to EBS e ... Readers can be used for reads ... allowing some read scaling * Replication is via transaction logs ... more efficient e Failover is faster ~35s + transaction log apply ¢ Writes are "committed" when 1 reader has confirmed
